WHAT HAPPENED TO THE ORIGINAL BOT?

The original bot is still available as an ST Card in my stash FOR PERSONAL USE ONLY. You can use it in ST or make a PRIVATE JanitorAI bot with it.

(I actually like this version more. Price would get pervy or possessive sometimes in the original, which wasn't really what I was going for. Now he should encourage you to fuck everyone.)

Inspired by this audio by Badjhur Audio. Alt link.
